---
title: Paths
listing:
    id: paths
    contents: paths
    feed: true
    sort: "date desc"
    type: table
    fields: [title, date]
    date-format: long
    sort-ui: true
    filter-ui: true
    max-items: 4
format: html
css: styles.css
---


<div class="centered-image">
![](paths/images/paths_landing_img.jpg){height=250}
<figcaption>Credit to https://get.pxhere.com for the image.</figcaption>
</div>


Welcome to the Paths page here you can find collections of guides and articles that will help you to reach a certain role, title, of challenge. The most common path to start on is the research life cycle. In this Path each of the stages of working on a research project has different set of skills required to complete it and you can find guides on how to attain those skills in the Path. 

A Path can be thought of as a course often with quite a specific aim. Paths are made by Landelijke Docs whereas Programmes are collections of guides, walkthroughs, and articles to help you prepare for a role, title, or challenge as collated by a specific institute. It is recommended that you follow a path in the order it is in, but feel free to skip parts you already know.

Below you can find find a selection of existing paths and a filter system to browse them based on specific wishes. 

::: {#events}
:::
